evidence.q1: Sections are numbered 1 through 15 sequentially; no cross-references that could break.
evidence.q2: Defined term "Personal Data" (Section 2) is used inconsistently in Section 1: "For personal data processed under this DPA..." (lowercase, not matching the defined term).
evidence.q3: All time frames are specific (2 business days, 24 hours, 30 days, 10 business days, 365 days); no vague phrases like "reasonable while" or "next quarter".
evidence.q4: No archaic or out-of-register legal diction; modern commercial language throughout.
evidence.q5: No sentence contains internal contradictions or grammatical breakage; all sentences are coherent.
evidence.q6: Register remains uniform across all sections; no section reads as if written by a different author.
